TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Thongloun Sisoulith Thongloun Sisoulith (ryax sa 10 na byacing tay 11 squ kawas na 1945 - misu), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1945) mrhuw Laos ta' misuw hya' ga Thongloun Sisoulith, aring ryax tay 22 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2021 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Thongloun Sisoulith minkahul sa Houaphanh Province na Laos. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1945 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: tńßoŇčloun s~…ēis~…ēoulitńß tńßoŇčloun s~…ēis~…ēoulitńß (rjax s~…ēa ** na ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēqu kawas~…ē na **** - mis~…ēu), ńßja …£a s~…ēquliq na pklańßaŇč …£a…£a. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw laos~…ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a tńßoŇčloun s~…ēis~…ēoulitńß, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qjanux na s~…ēraral tńßoŇčloun s~…ēis~…ēoulitńß minkańßul s~…ēa ńßouapńßanńß pro*in ¶~ ®e na laos~…ē. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®anpjuta ńßknjun
S.FORM: Thongloun Sisoulith Thongloun Sisoulith (ryax sa 10 na byacing tay 11 squ kawas na 1945 - misu), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1945) mrhuw Laos ta' misuw hya' ga Thongloun Sisoulith, aring ryax tay 22 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2021 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Thongloun Sisoulith minkahul sa Houaphanh Province na Laos. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1945 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun

(minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw laos~…ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a tńßoŇčloun s~…ēis~…ēoulitńß, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qjanux na s~…ēraral tńßoŇčloun s~…ēis~…ēoulitńß minkańßul s~…ēa ńßouapńßanńß pro*in ¶~ ®e na laos~…ē. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®anpjuta ńßknjun
